creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 154230
Patch to upgrade net/turnserver to 3.2.5.6 (as a git commit)

Patch was generated from a git commit to my clone of the freebsd-ports repo on github: https://github.com/bradleythughes/freebsd-ports/commit/190696a2df27f415c54a28f2f1045f0949842c49
